description: Style NoteThese globalite shoes with sturdy soles, bold overlays and style highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek shoe. Wear it with fitted denims and a T-shirt.Product DetailsBlunt toed white shoes with mesh upper and synthetic overlaysHas central lace-ups with a padded tongue and innerThick foamy midsole, upraised at the heelTPU outsole with multiple lugs and a scooped heel and an arched midfootThe shoes come with a bag to help you pack them when you travelMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
